nodes.name: Stat.svelte
nodes.summary: Reusable UI stat display component with label/value layout, color variants (green, amber, red, purple, blue, teal), size options (sm, md, lg), and optional hover state. Renders children snippet or static value.

nodes.name: uiConstants.ts
nodes.summary: Constants file exporting UI_COLORS (hex color map for damage types, tag groups, source types, enchant rarities, negative stats), SOURCE_LABELS (display names for rune/perk/weaponArt/race/cantrip), and internal STAT_LABELS and TAG_LABELS maps.

nodes.name: main.ts
nodes.summary: Application entry point. Imports global CSS, mounts the Svelte App component to #app DOM element, and injects Vercel analytics.

nodes.name: ModalSearchHeader.svelte
nodes.summary: Reusable modal header component combining a title, search input with SuggestDrop autocomplete, optional TagFilter, optional StatFilter/WeaponStatFilter, and optional sort mode buttons (Highest/Most Effective/Brawny) for armor sorting. Dispatches select, toggle, clear, change, and weaponStatFilterChange events.

nodes.name: MountIcon.svelte
nodes.summary: Inline SVG icon component rendering a mount icon with a blue-to-cyan linear gradient. Accepts a size prop.

nodes.name: ScalingBreakdownRow.svelte
nodes.summary: Renders a single row in the damage scaling breakdown table showing damage type dot, scaling value × boost percentage = contribution percentage. Uses roundMultiplier utility and PERCENT_STATS to determine formatting.

nodes.name: StatFilter.svelte
nodes.summary: Collapsible stat filter panel with positive/negative stat tabs, include/exclude toggle states, and sort modes (highest/lowest/alphabetical). Defines stat groups for boosts, defenses, and utilities. Uses StatChip, createFilterActions, and dispatches change events with filter map and sort mode.

nodes.name: SuggestDrop.svelte
nodes.summary: Dropdown suggestion list for search autocomplete. Displays name or perk suggestions with highlighted text matching the query. Dispatches select events on mousedown.

nodes.name: TagFilter.svelte
nodes.summary: Collapsible tag filter panel with grouped tag chips (Combat, Support, Status, Weapon Art/Rune, Special). Supports selectedTags set, hideTags exclusion, expand/collapse, and dispatches toggle/change/clear events. Shows active tag summary chips in the bar header.

nodes.name: WeaponStatFilter.svelte
nodes.summary: Collapsible weapon-specific stat filter panel with three groups: Damage Type, Scaling, and Boost/Stats. Uses include/exclude toggle states, StatChip components with tag prefixes (DMG/SCL/STAT), and exposes a matchesFilter method for programmatic filtering. Dispatches change events.

nodes.name: WeaponStatsDisplay.svelte
nodes.summary: Displays weapon statistics split into three groups: damage types (×multiplier), scalings (flat values), and boost/defense stats (percentage). Each stat rendered as a colored pill badge.

nodes.name: vite.config.ts
nodes.summary: Vite build configuration. Configures Svelte plugin, VitePWA with auto-update registration, workbox caching (stale-while-revalidate for navigation), and optional base path via VITE_BASE_PATH env var. Uses PWA manifest for voxlblade builder.

edges.label: modal header paired with stats display
